description_long: This rifle features a classic design with a wooden fixed stock and a long, slender barrel. The receiver and barrel assembly are constructed from dark metal, with a prominent external magazine and a mounted scope for enhanced aiming precision. The wooden stock has a smooth, polished finish, contrasting with the matte metallic components. The trigger guard and grip are integrated into the metal receiver, and the magazine protrudes downward in front of the trigger. The scope is mounted on top of the receiver, suggesting the rifle is intended for accurate, long-range shooting. The overall appearance is reminiscent of early to mid-20th-century military rifles, blending wood and metal for both durability and aesthetics.
description: A classic rifle with a polished wooden stock, dark metal receiver, long barrel, and a mounted scope for precision aiming.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, highlighting the wooden stock, metal receiver, scope, and magazine.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the narrow barrel profile and the alignment of the scope above the receiver.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, again showing the wooden stock, metal receiver, scope, and magazine from the other side.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the butt of the wooden stock and the alignment of the barrel and scope.
